calendar.matters:
MOTION To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-16-2002 Advanced From Apr-23-02 To Apr-17-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

MOTION To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-17-2002 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Defendant and moving party Ephraim Tene appeared in propria persona. Defendant Elizabeth Tene did not appear. Rodney M. Sweet, Esq. Of SWEET & KLEINMAN (925) 284-1025 appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party W. J. Britton.

Evidentiary hearing: at 10:29 a.m. Ephraim Tene was affirmed and examined on his own behalf. At 10: 36 a.m. John F. Britton was affirmed and examined on his own behalf. At 10: 37 a.m. there being only minimal argument the court DENIED the motion to set aside finding no evidence of any waiver of rent nor evidence of neglect, excusable nor otherwise. (JJM/KH) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
